findings.class: code graph DB is a rebuildable cache at database/code-graph.sqlite with WAL sidecars
schema has only code_files, code_nodes, code_edges, schema_version, code_graph_metadata plus ordinary indexes
sqlite3 .recover emits a SQL reconstruction stream with pragmas, CREATE statements, surviving INSERT OR IGNORE rows, indexes, and COMMIT
findings.evidence: https://www.sqlite.org/recovery.html; local temp-copy .recover experiment using SQLite 3.51.0

findings.class: .recover output remains suspect and may miss, resurrect, alter, or misplace content
partial scan persistence is retryable because file_mtime_ms is staged at 0 until nodes and edges land
bad recovery/import should roll back by quarantining the DB triplet and running a full source scan
verification requires integrity_check, foreign_key_check, orphan-node/edge checks, WAL checkpoint, status readiness, and a query smoke test
